license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rw9d7h6
title: Starvation Assay
author: Wen Aw

steps_raw.instruction: 72 early third instar wandering female larvae were collected from each mitotype and placed in lots of 12 into 6 vials
6 x 3 cm pieces of filter paper were wetted with ddH2O and placed in each vial, and had water added twice daily to maintain humidity
Larvae were observed 5 times daily by gentle prodding to determine if they were alive.
Mean time to death was recorded.
